title: cissus quadricornuta
intro: Cissus quadricornuta, also known as Veldt grape or Horsewhip vine, is a woody vine native to Africa and Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine. It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cissus quadricornuta include its ability to improve bone density, reduce pain and inflammation, and aid in weight loss. In herbal preparations, Cissus quadricornuta is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
